# Pseudo-Second-Order

**Summary**: A kinetic model where the rate of adsorption is proportional to the number of available sites.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]] applied pseudo-second-order models to determine the adsorption mechanism and capacity.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The pseudo-second-order model provided the best fit (R² = 0.998-0.999) for methylene blue on PG. ([[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021, p. 72]])
